summary: markdownlint-cli2-fix postinstall exfiltrates host data to oastify.com (Burp Collaborator) C2
details: This package is a typosquat / lookalike of markdownlint-cli2 whose postinstall script (postinstall.js) executes automatically on `npm install`. The script imports `http`, `https`, `os`, and `child_process`, calls `os.hostname()` and `execSync(...)` to gather system information (hostname, username, OS version), and POSTs the collected data to hardcoded oastify.com subdomains (e.g. `http://xxxxxxxxx.oastify.com` and `http://i0jvc03bvcjt40q39f5fx8671y72vxjm.oastify.com`). oastify.com is the Burp Collaborator out-of-band interaction service used as attacker-controlled C2 / exfiltration infrastructure. Installation of this package causes immediate disclosure of installer host metadata and command-execution output to the attacker's collaborator instance.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
